So what of the photos? Wonderfully, these are signed by their photographer: John Thomson, a Scotsman, and the first to photograph Angkor Wat in 1866. In 1867, Thomson published a book of his photographs of the temple ruins, The  ...    photograph. The photos are all labeled and identified as being Nakhon Wat, the “Temple of the Capital,” known as Angkor  ...    of it. Many of the RBSC photos are of the temple’s sculptural reliefs depicting key scenes from Rāmăyānă – Rama’s  ...    wife Sita who has been abducted by Ravana. title: Angkor Wat Devata Inventory - Ver. 05-30-2013
highlights:
Angkor Wat, Cambodia – This Angkor Wat Devata Inventory identifies working counts and locations of all devata (sacred female) images in Angkor Wat.
